buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/harent run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.resolve('artifacts/harent/dist/public');const dst=path.resolve('public');console.log('Copying',src,'->',dst);fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('Done. Contents:',fs.readdirSync(dst))"
